page_content:
Prerequisite: PSYC300 and PSYC341.

Restriction: Must be in Psychology program.

PSYC447 Diversity in Organizations (3 Credits)

Overview and active discussion of issues related to diversity and discrimination in organizations from several different perspectives, including: the person(s) being stigmatized, the person(s) doing the stigmatizing, the bystander(s) witnessing stigmatization of others, and the organization. Course readings address each of these perspectives, along with an introductory unit that outlines key concepts of diversity. Prerequisite: PSYC300.

Credit Only Granted for. PSYC489E or PSYC447.
